title: Quilted Puffy Neoprene Makeup Bag, Waterproof Travel Cosmetic Pouch Custom Logo
seoTitle: Custom Quilted Neoprene Cosmetic Bag Manufacturer | OEM Makeup Bag Factory
description:
This quilted neoprene cosmetic bag combines a modern padded design with practical functionality, making it an ideal choice for beauty brands, retailers, promotional companies, and wholesalers. Made from premium neoprene material, it offers a soft touch, lightweight construction, excellent durability, and water-resistant performance for everyday use and travel.

The spacious interior is perfect for organizing makeup, skincare products, brushes, toiletries, and other daily essentials. Its structured quilted design provides extra protection while maintaining a stylish appearance. The smooth zipper closure keeps belongings secure, and the minimalist exterior offers an excellent surface for custom branding.

As a professional OEM & ODM manufacturer, O'lay Technology Co., Ltd provides complete customization services, including logo printing, custom colors, dimensions, zipper styles, linings, packaging, and private label solutions to meet your branding requirements.
seoDescription: O'lay Technology Co., Ltd manufactures custom quilted neoprene cosmetic bags with OEM & ODM services. Customize logos, colors, sizes and packaging for beauty brands, wholesalers and private label projects worldwide.
